Collection of separate PDF docs
```](#)# Creating your file...This may take a few minutes. Thanks for your patience.CancelYour file is readyOKBefore you upgrade ONTAP, you can use the Active IQ Config Advisor tool to check for common configuration errors.Active IQ Config Advisor is a configuration validation tool for NetApp systems. It can be deployed at both secure sites and nonsecure sites for data collection and system analysis.| | |
| --- | --- |
| Note | Support for Active IQ Config Advisor is limited and is available only online. |Steps1. Log in to the [NetApp Support Site](https://mysupport.netapp.com/site/global/), and then click **TOOLS** > **Tools**.
2. Under **Active IQ Config Advisor**, click [Download App](https://mysupport.netapp.com/site/tools/tool-eula/activeiq-configadvisor).
3. Download, install, and run Active IQ Config Advisor.
4. After running Active IQ Config Advisor, review the tool's output, and follow the recommendations that are provided to address any issues discovered by the tool.
